Uses of Package
org.apache.sling.api.wrappers

Packages that use org.apache.sling.api.wrappers
Package
Description
org.apache.sling.api.wrappers
 
org.apache.sling.scripting.jsp.util
 
  • Classes in org.apache.sling.api.wrappers used by org.apache.sling.api.wrappers
    Class
    Description
    DeepReadValueMapDecorator
    A value map wrapper which implements deep reading of properties based on the resource tree.
    JakartaToJavaxServletWrapper
    This class wraps a servlet based on the Jakarta Servlet API to implement Servlet API 3.
    JavaxToJakartaServletWrapper
    This class wraps a servlet based on the Servlet API 3 to implement Jakarta Servlet API.
    ValueMapDecorator
    ValueMapDecorator decorates another Map to provide a basic implementation for the additional methods of a ValueMap.
  • Classes in org.apache.sling.api.wrappers used by org.apache.sling.scripting.jsp.util
    Class
    Description
    SlingHttpServletResponseWrapper
    Deprecated.
    Use SlingJakartaHttpServletResponseWrapper
